title: Python Developer
description: We are looking for a skilled Python Developer to join our dynamic team. You will be responsible for developing high-quality software solutions, integrating data storage solutions, and collaborating with cross-functional teams to define and ship new features.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Join our AI/ML team to build and deploy machine learning models at scale. Work with large datasets, implement deep learning architectures, and drive AI initiatives across multiple business units.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Develop and maintain web applications using React and Node.js. Collaborate with UX designers, product managers, and backend engineers to deliver high-quality software products used by millions.

title: Data Scientist
description: Drive data-driven decision making across Amazon business units. Build predictive models, perform statistical analysis, and communicate insights to senior leadership teams.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Manage CI/CD pipelines, cloud infrastructure, and deployment automation. Ensure system reliability, performance, and security across all production environments.

title: Frontend Developer
description: Build and optimize Razorpay payment dashboard and merchant-facing products. Work on React-based SPAs with strong focus on performance, accessibility, and user experience.

title: AI Engineer
description: Build AI systems for Swiggy customer support automation, recommendation engine, and search. Work with LLMs, transformers, and large-scale data pipelines.

title: Backend Engineer
description: Design and build Zomato backend microservices handling millions of daily orders. Work on high-availability systems, API design, and database optimization at massive scale.

title: Software Engineer
description: Join Google engineering team to build scalable software systems used by billions. Work on core infrastructure and user-facing features with world-class engineers.

title: ML Research Engineer
description: Research and develop next-generation ML systems at Microsoft Azure AI. Publish research, build prototypes, and transfer technology to product teams at scale.

title: React Developer
description: Build interfaces that connect billions of people. Work on Facebook, Instagram, or WhatsApp frontend systems using React and GraphQL at unprecedented scale.

title: Cloud Architect
description: Lead cloud transformation initiatives for Fortune 500 clients. Design multi-cloud architectures, security frameworks, and migration strategies for enterprise systems.
